title: Oregon Yellow Round 3mm Strimmer Line, Trimmer Line Tackles Long Grass, Weeds, Edges & Thick Vegetation, Professional Heavy Duty Nylon Strimmer Wire, Fits Most Standard Models, 3.0mm x 169m (69-371-Y)
features: 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗙𝗘𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗔𝗟 𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗘: Our heavy duty strimmer wire delivers clean, precise grass cutting with impact resistance on hard surfaces and a donut-style spool to reduce tangling
𝗨𝗡𝗜𝗩𝗘𝗥𝗦𝗔𝗟 𝗙𝗜𝗧: Fitting all standard strimmer heads, this grass strimmer cord can be used with most brands, including: Husqvarna, Stihl, Shindaiwa, Echo, Bosch, Mac Allister and more
𝗛𝗜𝗚𝗛-𝗤𝗨𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗧𝗬 𝗡𝗬𝗟𝗢𝗡: Our easy to fit wire is made of long-lasting, flexible and durable nylon that is resistant to wear and fray in all weather conditions, to be used all-year-round
𝗥𝗢𝗨𝗡𝗗-𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗣𝗘𝗗 𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗜𝗠𝗠𝗘𝗥 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘: This grass trimmer line shape provides the most versatility, suitable for a wide range of trimming with quiet operation, long-lasting and easy to use
𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗔𝗟 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗠𝗘𝗗𝗜𝗨𝗠 𝗔𝗡𝗗 𝗟𝗢𝗡𝗚 𝗚𝗥𝗔𝗦𝗦: Available in a variety of lengths depending on your application, such as grass, rocky soil and vegetation; essential for homeowners and professionals alike
description: From the manufacturer Getting up early and doing a good day of work is a way of life for you, and it's our way of life too. From saw chain and guide bars to lawnmower blades and trimmer line, we make high-quality, durable products you can depend on every day. Why Oregon Trimmer Line? You take pride in your work, and we know you work hard every day. The craftsmanship you put into your job or project requires solutions designed and built to exacting standards. Oregon stands by you. Our trimmer line products perform to your standards, and then exceeds your expectations. Ideal for heavy duty use by professionals and contractors, Oregon trimmer line works as hard as you do. Long-lasting, high-quality nylon, resistant to wear and fray Impact resistance on hard surfaces Fits most gas, corded, and battery-powered string trimmers User-friendly packaging reduces tangling 𝗩𝗔𝗥𝗜𝗘𝗧𝗬 𝗢𝗙 𝗦𝗛𝗔𝗣𝗘𝗦 & 𝗦𝗜𝗭𝗘𝗦 Our Yellow line comes in: Round Square Star And from 1.7mm - 4mm lines, 15m to 280m spools 𝗛𝗜𝗚𝗛 𝗤𝗨𝗔𝗟𝗜𝗧𝗬 𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗜𝗔𝗟𝗦 Designed and engineered by experts for strength and wear resistance. Crafted to withstand fraying and impact on hard surfaces in all weather, to keep you going all year round. 𝗘𝗙𝗙𝗜𝗖𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗧 𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗘 We offer a premium solution to tackle thick, overgrown grass and dense weeds, for medium to heavy workloads on grass, weeds, rocky soil, and bramble. 𝗬𝗘𝗟𝗟𝗢𝗪 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 Available in round, square and star shaped wire, sizes between 1.7mm and 4mm . Perfect for short to long grass and weeds. 𝗖𝗢𝗟𝗢𝗥𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 Available in orange, red, blue, yellow and green ; one colour per diameter from 1.3mm to 3mm . Perfect for short to long grass and rocky soil. 𝗡𝗬𝗟𝗜𝗨𝗠 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 Available in twisted round, square and star shapes from 1.3mm to 4mm. Perfect for high impact and intensive tasks due to the embedded aluminium design. 𝗗𝗨𝗢𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗘 Available from 2mm to 4mm , it's round shape and carbon core is designed for flexibility and shock absorbency for thick vegetation and rocky terrain.
